scripts.build: npm run build:egui-wasm && vue-tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:wasm: cd ../pitch-core && (wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --features wasm || (cargo install wasm-pack && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --features wasm)) || echo 'WASM build skipped or failed'
scripts.build:egui-wasm: cd ../egui && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir ../web/public/egui-wasm --no-typescript ../egui/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/guitar_tuner_egui.wasm || echo 'egui wasm build skipped or failed'
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && cd ../desktop && npm run tauri build
